violations.text: Reduced oxygen packaged (ROP)seafood (imitation crab stick and shredded imitation crab) were observed thawing with the package intact. ROP seafood must be completely removed from the package when thawing. The internal food temperature was observed at 35-37 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. Employee removed the imitation crab from the package during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2025
